query:
-- 1. Corregir op_status de Cañón Colorado a 'confirmado'
UPDATE reservation_operational 
SET op_status = 'confirmado' 
WHERE reservation_id = 450006 AND op_status = 'pendiente';

-- 2. Verificar el estado final
SELECT ro.id, ro.reservation_id, ro.op_status, ro.client_confirmed,
       r.customer_name, r.customer_email, r.status as res_status
FROM reservation_operational ro
JOIN reservations r ON r.id = ro.reservation_id
WHERE ro.reservation_id = 450006;

-- 3. Verificar el cliente en CRM
SELECT id, name, email, source FROM clients WHERE email = 'jorgemgrande@gmail.com';
